data.title: RESTful API Integration
data.description: Seamless integration with RESTful APIs for data exchange.
data.technical_spec: Uses JSON or XML for request/response. Follows standard HTTP methods.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decentralized architecture built on interconnected microservices.
data.technical_spec: Each microservice has a distinct responsibility and is deployable independently.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Distributes content globally to improve load times.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes edge servers to cache content closer to end-users.

data.title: Responsive Design Framework
data.description: Adaptable UI that functions across a variety of devices.
data.technical_spec: Built using CSS media queries and flexible grid layouts.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Evenly distributes network traffic to prevent overload.
data.technical_spec: Uses algorithms such as round-robin and least connections.
